response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed video structure. Identified three main segments: intro dialogue (00:00-00:52), performance of "Go-Getters" (00:52-04:14), and outro/announcement (04:14-05:00). Song "Go-Getters" metadata (title, artists) was taken from on-screen text. Performed web search for lyrics: "Go-Getters Hololive lyrics". Found that "PRISONER" mentioned in the outro is just an announcement, not a performance in this video, so it was excluded from lyric lookup. Constructed the final JSON.
response.global_summary: This video shows a performance of the song "Go-Getters" by members of Hololive Advent, framed by intro and outro dialogue, and an announcement about a new song, "PRISONER".

scenes.description: The characters perform "Go-Getters". Metadata for the song appears on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Yeah, that's karma, yeah, get down
Checkmate, I'm a superstar
Stay insane, but you rock with it
Like 24/7, I'm a hot mess ya, love-hate
Get less bored, oh my god, home run, bat-a-bat-a-swing my shot
Like a villainous villainess, villains bring home the jackpot

ユラ・シャマ・アイ　ブレーキも止まらない
派手にブチかまそう

Yeah, that's karma

Life's just a tightrope, why not stop to fool around?
"Chaotic good" is peak right now
I can show you how
Don't get confused, we are not the same
I'm a ruthless dame
No way, no way
"Good vs. Evil" is so overdone
Let's all kick back and party, just leave it to me

Loosen my lips
That's karma

Sorry, I'm just better
Sorry, we're go-getters
Ain't my fault we're wicked, stunning, tricky, why you running?
Bet'cha think you're clever
Whatever!
Talk about a "kumbaya"

フルボッコ　ボッちゃって
欲望　召し上がれ
愛ハート　Get down
Sayonara　サイコですわ
ドメスティック　ドラマティック
愛しき人々　この指とまれ

Welcome to Miss Fortune's game.
